description:
India Book IV,19 (ח62). Letter from Ḥalfon b. Netanʾel to Yūsuf b. al-Khāzin (Almeria). Ḥalfon requests Yūsuf's help with a shipment sent by the judge R. Elʿazar b. al-Qaṣabī in Fusṭāṭ to his brother in Lucena. Ḥalfon wrote similar notes with requests to two other people; see also PGPID 7885. 

(Information from Goitein, Friedman and Ashur, India Book IVB)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12 מאלכסנדריה ל-Almeria. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
